verses.text: The altar of shittim wood with horns is made. The altar. Sacrifice has its appointed place.
The altar of shittim wood with horns is made. The altar. Sacrifice has its appointed place.
Its vessels and grate of brass are made. The vessels. Tools are prepared for the offerings.
Its vessels and grate of brass are made. The vessels. Tools are prepared for the offerings.
Its vessels and grate of brass are made. The vessels. Tools are prepared for the offerings.
Staves to bear it; hollow with boards, as shown in the mount. Portable. The altar travels with the people.
Staves to bear it; hollow with boards, as shown in the mount. Portable. The altar travels with the people.
Staves to bear it; hollow with boards, as shown in the mount. Portable. The altar travels with the people.
The south and west sides of the court are hung with fine linen on pillars. The court. A bounded space sets off the holy.
The south and west sides of the court are hung with fine linen on pillars. The court. A bounded space sets off the holy.
The south and west sides of the court are hung with fine linen on pillars. The court. A bounded space sets off the holy.
The south and west sides of the court are hung with fine linen on pillars. The court. A bounded space sets off the holy.
The east side and its hangings are made. The sides. The enclosure is completed.
The east side and its hangings are made. The sides. The enclosure is completed.
The east side and its hangings are made. The sides. The enclosure is completed.
The gate of the court, its pins, and all the vessels of brass. The gate. One entrance opens to worship.
The gate of the court, its pins, and all the vessels of brass. The gate. One entrance opens to worship.

Pure oil for the lamp to burn always before the LORD. The light. The lamp is tended morning and evening.
